title: (Bullish Signal) ICLR, price moved above its 50-day Moving Average on March 30, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor found 45 similar cases, and 36 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 80%. Current price $197.55 crossed the support line at $189.06 and is trading between $203.08 resistance and $189.06 support lines. Throughout the month of 02/26/21 - 03/30/21, the price experienced a +9% Uptrend. During the week of 03/23/21 - 03/30/21, the stock enjoyed a +7% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/7tcdf9kkudq61.png?width=1522&format=png&auto=webp&s=d2755595e4d512758129c15a9691dc26fa93dec5

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on March 12, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on ICLR as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 66 of 95 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 69%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for ICLR just turned positive on March 15, 2021. Looking at past instances where ICLR's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in  31 of 48 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 65%.

Following a +3.25% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ICLR advanced for three days, in 228 of 335 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 68%.
